parameters.text:
=You are a professional news summarizer working for a senior newspaper editor.

You will receive a news article title and content.

Your job is to write TWO things:

1. HEADLINE
Write a strong, clear, professional headline in maximum 10 words.

2. SUMMARY
Write exactly 5 to 6 sentences as a plain paragraph.
Cover these points:
- What happened
- Who is involved
- Where and when it happened
- Why it matters
- What is expected to happen next

Rules:
- No bullet points
- No sub-headings
- Plain paragraph only
- Professional newspaper tone
- Do not start with "This article" or "The article"
- Write as if you are informing a busy senior editor who needs the full picture in 30 seconds

Input:
Title: {{ $json.title }}
Content: {{ $json.contentSnippet }}

options.systemMessage:
You are a professional news editor. Summarize the article in exactly 5 to 6  sentences maximum. 
Be factual and neutral. Mention: what happened, who is involved, why it matters.
Output ONLY the summary. No intro phrases. Keep it under 60 words.

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json; const articles = input.articles || []; const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-PK', { weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric', timeZone: 'Asia/Karachi' }); let newsHTML = ''; articles.forEach((d, index) => { newsHTML += `

News ${index + 1}

${d.title || 'No Title'}

${d.pubDate || ''}

${d.summary || 'No summary available'}

Read Full Article → ${index < articles.length - 1 ? '
' : ''}
`; }); // Fallback if articles array is empty if (articles.length === 0) { newsHTML = '

No articles found. Check Combine Summaries node.

'; } const html = ` Morning News Digest

🗞️ Morning News Digest

${today}

✅ ${articles.length} verified stories from trusted sources, summarized, and fact-checked for you.

${newsHTML}

📡 Sources: Al Jazeera • Dawn • BBC World • Reuters • AP News • Google News
🕖 Delivered automatically every morning at 7:00 AM PKT
Powered by n8n + Groq AI

`; return [{ json: { html, subject: `🗞️ Morning News Digest — ${today}` } }];
